name: I slipped at work but pain started days later, does that hurt my case in Salt Lake?
description: No, get medical link; report and treat early.

mainEntity.name: I slipped at work but pain started days later, does that hurt my case in Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, get medical link; report and treat early.
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, delayed symptoms common; document doctor linking to incident.** Workers' comp covers if work-related.[1] Key factors: See doctor immediately even if minor. Get MRI for hidden injuries. Avoid work until cleared. Insurers challenge delays—counter with medical opinion. Lawyer proves causation.
